Definition: The name or identifier of a given pen
The valid combinations of animal types  that can be in a pen. CALF = Calves; GROWING = HeiferI's and HeiferII's; CLOSE_UP = HeiferIII's and Dry Cows; LAC_COWS = Lactating Cows
The elevation gain (in meters) between the pen and the milking parlor
The distance (in meters) between the pen  and the milking parlor
The number of stalls in the pen
The type of pen (freestall, tiestall, open lot, compost bedded pack barn)
Max: freestall,  tiestall,  open lot,  compost bedded,  pack barn

Definition: The maximum ratio of the number of animals in the pen to the number of stalls in the pen
The ID number of the manure management practices that are used for this pen (scenarios are defined in manure management schema)
